testCases.title: The user should be able to register when valid email and password are entered
preconditions: User is on the registration screen

steps.content: Enter a valid email address in the email field
steps.expected: Email field accepts input and shows no error

steps.content: Enter a valid password meeting complexity requirements
steps.expected: Password field accepts input and shows no error

testCases.expectedResult: User account is created successfully and user is redirected to the onboarding or dashboard screen

testCases.title: Verify the error message should display invalid email format when user enters email without @ symbol
preconditions: User is on the registration screen

steps.content: Enter an invalid email address missing '@' symbol

steps.expected: Registration is blocked and error message is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating invalid email format and registration is not processed

testCases.title: Verify the error message should display password complexity error when password does not meet policy
preconditions: User is on the registration screen

steps.content: Enter a password that does not meet complexity (e.g., too short or missing special characters)

steps.expected: Registration is blocked and error message is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating password complexity requirements and registration is not processed

testCases.title: The user should not be able to register when email is already linked to a social login account
preconditions: User is on the registration screen
Email is already registered via Google SSO

steps.content: Enter the email address linked to an existing Google SSO account

steps.expected: Registration is blocked and error message is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating the email is already linked to a social login and cannot register with password

testCases.title: The user should be able to register when using borderline valid email formats
preconditions: User is on the registration screen

steps.content: Enter an unusual but valid email address (e.g., user+tag@sub.domain.co.uk)
steps.expected: Email field accepts input and shows no error

steps.content: Enter a valid password meeting complexity requirements
steps.expected: Password field accepts input and shows no error

testCases.expectedResult: User account is created successfully and user is redirected to the onboarding or dashboard screen

testCases.title: The registration process should handle network interruptions gracefully when submitting data
preconditions: User is on the registration screen
Network connectivity is unstable or lost during submission

steps.content: Tap the Register button while network is disconnected
steps.expected: System attempts submission and fails due to network error

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating network failure and is able to retry registration

testCases.section: Login via Google Social Single Sign-On (SSO)

testCases.title: The user should be able to login successfully when valid Google SSO credentials are provided
preconditions: User is on the login screen
User has a valid Google account linked

steps.content: Complete Google authentication with valid credentials
steps.expected: User is authenticated and redirected to dashboard

testCases.expectedResult: User is logged in successfully via Google SSO within 3 seconds

testCases.title: Verify the error message should display when Google SSO token is expired or revoked
preconditions: User is on the login screen
Google SSO token is expired or revoked

steps.content: Attempt to authenticate with expired/revoked token

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating Google login failure and is prompted to retry or use alternate login

testCases.title: The system should handle Google SSO service latency gracefully when logging in
preconditions: User is on the login screen
Google SSO service is slow or delayed

steps.content: Wait for Google SSO response with induced latency

testCases.expectedResult: User is informed of ongoing login process and system does not freeze or crash

testCases.title: The user should be able to request password reset when registered email is entered
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password screen
testCases.expectedResult: User receives password reset email and sees confirmation message

testCases.title: Verify the error message should display when unregistered email is entered in Forgot Password
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password screen
testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating email is not registered and no reset email is sent

testCases.title: Verify the error message should display when Forgot Password is requested for a locked account
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password screen
Account associated with email is locked

steps.content: Enter the locked account's email address

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating account is locked and instructions to contact support

testCases.title: The Forgot Password flow should handle network interruptions gracefully during submission
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password screen
Network connectivity is lost during submission

steps.content: Tap the Submit button while network is disconnected
steps.expected: Submission fails due to network error

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating network failure and is able to retry password reset request

testCases.section: Input Validation for Email and Password Fields

testCases.title: The email field should display an error when left empty on registration
preconditions: User is on the registration screen

steps.expected: Registration is blocked and error message is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating email is required

testCases.title: The password field should display an error when left empty on registration
preconditions: User is on the registration screen

steps.expected: Registration is blocked and error message is displayed

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating password is required

testCases.title: The email field should handle case insensitivity when logging in
preconditions: User is on the login screen
User has a registered email with mixed case

steps.content: Enter the registered email address with different casing (e.g., User@Example.com vs user@example.com)

testCases.expectedResult: User is logged in successfully regardless of email case

testCases.title: The login process should complete within 3 seconds under normal conditions
preconditions: User is on the login screen
User has valid credentials
testCases.expectedResult: User is logged in successfully and total login time is under 3 seconds

testCases.title: The system should lock the account after multiple rapid failed login attempts
preconditions: User is on the login screen
User has a valid account

steps.content: Attempt to login with invalid password 5 times consecutively
steps.expected: Each login attempt is rejected with error

testCases.expectedResult: User account is locked and subsequent login attempts are blocked with lockout message

testCases.title: The user should see clear error messages when account is locked after failed login attempts
preconditions: User account is locked

steps.content: Attempt to login with correct credentials on locked account

testCases.expectedResult: User sees an error message indicating account lockout and instructions for recovery
